channel.title: RailsKit Blog
channel.description: Guides, tutorials, and insights on building AI-powered Rails applications.

item.title: Getting Started with RailsKit
item.description: A quick guide to setting up RailsKit and shipping your first AI-powered Rails app.
item.author: RailsKit Team

item.title: Why Rails is Perfect for AI Applications
item.description: Rails brings rapid full-stack development to the AI ecosystem. Here's why it matters.
item.author: RailsKit Team
